zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson於大約1705年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞時，她的父親Mouns Jonasson43歲，母親Ingeborg Lycon37歲。她於大約1729年與Francis Alexander Hughes Sr在美國賓夕法尼亞州結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson于大约1705年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞时，她的父亲Mouns Jonasson43岁，母亲Ingeborg Lycon37岁。她于大约1729年与Francis Alexander Hughes Sr在美国宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Jonasson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik, Klas, Lars, Per.  German Ernst.
Swedish: patronymic from the Biblical personal name   Jonas  .
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Jonassen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Jonason
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Jonasson   or Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Jonassen  .

variants.name: Jonas
meanings: English, German, French, Dutch, Polish, Lithuanian, Sorbian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Czech (Jonáš); Slovak (mainly Jonáš, also Jónáš, Jónás); Hungarian (Jónás): from a personal name, which is a variant of the Biblical name Jonah, Hebrew Yonah, meaning ‘dove’ in Hebrew. In the book of the Bible which bears his name, Jonah was appointed by God to preach repentance to the city of Nineveh, but tried to flee instead to Tarshish. On the voyage to Tarshish, a great storm arose and Jonah was thrown overboard by his shipmates to appease God's wrath, swallowed by a great fish, and delivered by it on the shores of Nineveh. This story exercised a powerful hold on the popular imagination in medieval Europe, and the personal name was a relatively common choice. The Hebrew name and its reflexes in other languages (for example Yiddish Yoyne) have been popular Jewish personal names for generations. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the Polish variant Jonasz. Compare Yonas .

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1728: Chester, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1729: Lancaster, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Lancaster, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson was born about 1705, in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, her father, Mouns Jonasson, was 43 and her mother, Ingeborg Lycon, was 37. She married Francis Alexander Hughes Sr about 1729, in Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

Elle a épousé Francis Alexander Hughes Sr environ 1729, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Lancaster, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Nilsdötter Jonassonが約1705年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアで生まれた時，父Mouns Jonassonは43歳，母Ingeborg Lyconは37歳であった。約1729年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州でFrancis Alexander Hughes Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州ランカスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson(이)가 대략 1705년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mouns Jonasson(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ingeborg Lycon(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1729년 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 Francis Alexander Hughes Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 랭커스터에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Francis Alexander Hughes Sr aproximadamente 1729, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson родилась около 1705 г. в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Mouns Jonasson было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Ingeborg Lycon, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Alexander Hughes Sr около 1729 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности ланкастир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pe: Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvania, British Colonial America
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson nació aproximadamente 1705, en Filadelfia, Philadelphia, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, su papá, Mouns Jonasson, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Ingeborg Lycon, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Francis Alexander Hughes Sr aproximadamente 1729, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Lancaster, Pensilvania, British Colonial America.
